about.heroTitle: Secure Journeys, Personal Service, Perfect Worship
about.coverageDesc: Rania Travel has been trusted and featured by various national media as a leading premium Hajj and Umrah organizer in Indonesia
about.milestoneDesc: Rania offers an exclusive Hajj and Umrah experience focused on comfort, security, and serene worship. With premium facilities and personal care, we are the dedicated 'Your Sacred Journey Partner' to the Baitullah
about.visionText: To become Indonesia's most trusted companion for exclusive Hajj and Umrah journeys, crafting pilgrimages defined by serenity, exceptional service, and a profound spiritual connection
about.coverageMedia1: Rania Travel presents premium Hajj and Umrah services with international standards.
about.coverageMedia2: Exclusive pilgrimage journeys with Rania, comfort and devotion guaranteed.
about.coverageMedia3: Rania Travel achieves 'A' accreditation as a trusted special Hajj organizer.
about.coverageMedia4: Rania Travel's premium service is the top choice for Indonesian Hajj and Umrah pilgrims.

hajj.ctaTitle: Have Questions? Get Answers in Minutes
hajj.ctaDesc: Rania is ready to provide immediate answers about your Hajj preparations
hajj.upgradeDesc: Enhance Your Spiritual Journey with Added Comfort
hajj.changeDesc: Find a Hajj Package That's the Right Fit for You
hajj.signatureCardDesc: Carry your blessings, not your worries; experience secure and simple payments throughout your journey with the Rania Signature Card

hajjUpgrade.heroTitle:
Fulfill the Call to Baitullah
Sooner, with Hajj Plus by Rania
hajjUpgrade.heroSubtitle: Discover why switching to Special Hajj (Hajj Plus) by RANIA is the best decision for peaceful worship
hajjUpgrade.whyTitle: Why Should You Switch to Hajj Plus by Rania?
hajjUpgrade.why1Desc: Waiting decades for Hajj? Time is the most precious thing. With Rania, you get the certainty of "Without The Wait" (No Long Queues). Plan your worship at your prime age with a clear schedule.
hajjUpgrade.why3Desc: Rania redefines the quality of Hajj worship. Pilgrims not only get Hotels in Prime Locations, but also 24/7 support facilities, Travel Insurance, Certified Mutawif, and Dedicated Tour Leader.
hajjUpgrade.why4Title: All Hajj Packages Use VIP Tents
hajjUpgrade.why4Desc: All Rania Hajj packages are guaranteed to use VIP111 Tent facilities.
hajjUpgrade.why5Title:
Expedited Departure at No
Additional Cost
hajjUpgrade.why5Desc: Expedited departure at no additional cost. So, if there are pilgrims who have been waiting 2-10 years and want to expedite their departure, it can be done without additional cost at Rania.
hajjUpgrade.why6Desc: Planning Hajj is now much easier and lighter. Pilgrims can start their journey to Baitullah because Hajj savings at Rania are only Rp 1.9 million/month for 5 years.
hajjUpgrade.signatureTitle: Exclusive Touch with RANIA Signature Collection
hajjUpgrade.sig1Desc: Planning Hajj is now much easier and lighter. Pilgrims can start their journey to Baitullah because Hajj savings at Rania are only Rp 1.9 million/month for 5 years.
hajjUpgrade.sig2Desc: Carry blessings, not worries. An exclusive card for easy transactions and payments during your time in the Holy Land.
hajjUpgrade.sig3Desc: Makkah-Madinah journey using High-Speed Train or VIP Private Bus, plus the option to upgrade fleet using GMC Yukon/Tahoe that guarantees privacy like a private car.
hajjUpgrade.stickySubtitle: Don't hesitate to contact the Rania team

umrah.heroTitle:
Weekly Journey
From Jakarta To Baitullah
umrah.noUmrahDesc: We're currently updating our Umrah offerings. Please check back soon or contact us for personalized Umrah inquiries.
umrah.customizeDesc: Quickly and easily change hotels, flights, dates, and destinations to match your plan.
umrah.ctaTitle: Ready to Answer the Call? Let's Plan Your Journey
umrah.ctaDesc: Turn your spiritual yearning into a blessed reality. Let us help you plan a seamless and meaningful Umrah journey
umrah.changeDesc: Add a Different Journey to Your Umrah Experience. Where Will Your Journey Take You Next?

umrahDetail.loadingDesc: Please wait while we prepare your Umrah package information.
umrahDetail.addonBannerTitle: Make Your Umrah Extra Special with "Add-On" as You Wish!
umrahDetail.addonBannerDesc: Package is all set, but want to add more facilities? Absolutely! Here, you're the decision maker. All additional services below are 100% Customizable. You can add VIP Airport service, upgrade transportation to GMC, and even add city tours to any package you choose.
umrahDetail.cancellationRefundRate: Refund rate in case of cancellation
umrahDetail.cancellationBeforeLast: Before the last (0) Day/Days of the package
umrahDetail.cancellationWithinLast: Within the last (0) Day/Days of the package
umrahDetail.cancellationFlightLink: Based on the cancellation policy of flight reservation
umrahDetail.cancellationNote1: 0% of the package value will be refunded in case of cancellation within (1) hours from the time of booking.
umrahDetail.cancellationNote2: 0% of the value of the package services will be refunded in case of cancellation after (1) hours, and before the last (0) Day/Days. An exception to this rule is the visa application processing fee, which is non-refundable after the 1-hour period.
umrahDetail.cancellationNote4: No refunds will be made in case of cancellation within the last (72) hours.
umrahDetail.cancellationNote5: The above rules apply to flight reservations organized by the service provider, and do not apply to custom flight reservations designated by the airline system for which specific cancellation policies apply to each reservation.
umrahDetail.cancellationNote6: 3.45% processing fees & its VAT will be deducted when the amounts are withdrawn from the wallet.
umrahDetail.cancellationNote7: Currency exchange rates may result in differences in the amounts deposited and withdrawn from digital wallets.
umrahDetail.stickySubtitle: Premium Service Agency for Umrah Services
